articles.description: Watch and follow live coverage of the 2026 London Marathon as a record number of runners take to the streets.
articles.title: London Marathon 2026 LIVE: Watch BBC coverage including winners, times & elite runners

articles.description: Nikola Jokic is ejected as the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the Denver Nuggets to move to the brink of victory in the NBA play-offs.
articles.title: NBA play-offs: Nikola Jokic ejected after scuffle in Minnesota Timberwolves win over Denver Nuggets

articles.description: Sabastian Sawe makes history at the London Marathon as the first person to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race.
articles.title: London Marathon 2026 results: Sabastian Sawe makes history with first competitive sub-two-hour marathon

articles.description: Manchester City were in a state of turmoil this time last year – staring at a first trophyless season since 2017 – but they are now in with a chance of a domestic treble.
articles.title: Man City 2-1 Southampton: Pep Guardiola's side go from trophyless to possible treble

articles.description: Arsenal deliver on Declan Rice's promise that the Premier League title race is "not done" with an important win over Newcastle.
articles.title: Arsenal 1-0 Newcastle: Gunners pick up important win in Premier League title race

articles.description: Fermin Lopez and Marcus Rashford score as Barcelona beat Getafe to move 11 points clear of Real Madrid in title race.
articles.title: Rashford scores as Barcelona close in on La Liga title

articles.description: British tight end Seydou Traore becomes a late-round pick in the NFL Draft along with Uar Bernard, a Nigerian yet to play a game of American football.
articles.title: NFL Draft 2026: Britain's Seydou Traore and Nigeria's Uar Bernard selected in late rounds

articles.title: Coventry City vs Wrexham LIVE: Championship stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Watch live coverage and follow text updates as Zhao Xintong takes on Ding Junhui & Mark Selby takes on Wu Yize in the second round at the Crucible in Sheffield.
articles.title: World Snooker Championship 2026 LIVE: Watch Zhao Xintong, Judd Trump, Ronnie O'Sullivan in round two action - stream, scores, results

articles.description: Liverpool will have to "wait and see" whether Mohamed Salah has played his final game for the club, says manager Arne Slot.
articles.title: Mohamed Salah: Liverpool have to 'wait and see' how serious injury is
